_provenance.strand: +1 (plus). allele_string is taken from the primary chromosomal mapping (seq_region_name in 1-22/X/Y/MT, not an MHC/haplotype contig).
_provenance.purpose: Reference plus-strand alleles for the categorical-panel strand guard (tests/backend/test_categorical_panel_strand.py). Each categorical-panel locus's curated {risk_allele, ref_allele} must be strand-consistent with these real alleles: both plus-strand or both Watson-Crick complements, never mixed. A mixed pair (e.g. rs4236601 risk=A plus + ref=C=complement-of-G) drops real heterozygous carriers in lookup_by_genotype. See issues #538 / #491.
_provenance.coverage_note: Seeded with the loci verified for #538. Bi-allelic-in-Ensembl loci additionally get a real-het-resolves check. Extend this map (one Ensembl GRCh37 lookup per rsid) to cover every categorical-panel locus; the follow-up to #538 tracks full coverage plus the multi-allelic loci (rs9273363, rs4341, rs1677693) and the inert mis-stranded rs2858884.
